sections.changelog:
0.2.3

  • Fix: bust metadata cache on WP forced update check so Check Again works immediately

0.2.2

  • Add pg_gallery_image CPT for SearchIQ indexing
  • Add sync-image endpoint: creates/updates stub posts from PostGlider Media Vault

0.2.1

  • Fix: add Authorization: Bearer header required by Supabase API gateway

0.2.0

  • GPL-2.0-or-later license
  • Version constant + auto-updater via GitHub releases
  • i18n on admin strings
  • apikey header for Supabase gateway
  • network-api configure-site endpoint
